power-weeder.name: Motocultor de Gasolina
power-weeder.nameEn: Best Power Weeder in India: A Smart Choice for Modern Farming
power-weeder.description: Cultivadores de gasolina para preparación de suelos
power-weeder.descriptionEn: In India the traditional approach of farming is replaced by modern farming techniques, which involves the use of modern machines, which helps in saving time and labor. Talking about the machines, one of the most useful machines is a power weeder, also known as a power tiller. It is widely used for weed removal, soil preparation, and intercultivation of soil. Farmers generally prefer a petrol-powered weeder because of its powerful engine and ease of use.  A 7 HP power weeder is a popular choice among farmers due to the right balance and power provided by the machine. It can work in small- to medium-sized land.

models.name: Motocultor de Gasolina MT900GA-208CC
models.metaDescription: Explore Mechnova's Power Weeder MT900GA-208CC. Designed for efficient soil preparation, durable performance, and trusted farming results.
models.specifications:
Motor: 208cc, 4 tiempos, gasolina
Potencia: 7HP
Ancho de trabajo: 36 cm
Profundidad máxima: 20 cm
Capacidad del tanque: 3.6L
Peso: 45 kg
Sistema de arranque: Manual retráctil
models.specificationsEn:
Max Power: 7 HP (208cc, 4-Stroke Engine, 40Cr Heavy Duty Crankshaft)
Power: 7HP
Working width: 1050 mm (4 groups)
Working Depth: ≥ 200 mm
Transmission Type: Gear Type (2 Forward, 1 Reverse)
Start Type: Recoil Starter
Air Filter: Oil Bath Type
Handle: Rotatable
Tyre Size: 4.00-8 Inflatable Tyre
Engine Oil Capacity: 0.6 L
Fuel Tank Capacity: 3.5 L
Gearbox Oil Capacity: 1.8 L
models.heading: Best Power Weeder machines in Bihar for farming and gardening
models.subHeading: In states like Bihar, where agriculture stands as the backbone of rural livelihood, farmers are switching from their traditional methods towards modern mechanized machineries. To generate higher yield of crops, maintaining soil health is a critical factor. Mechnova 7 HP power weeder is designed to carry out tilling and weeding in a single operation which offers farmers to save their valuable time.  By minimizing manual effort it speeds up field operations which saves labor cost which makes them a valuable addition to modern farming activities in Bihar.
features: Motor de gasolina de 4 tiempos de alta eficiencia
Transmisión por correa para mayor durabilidad
Fresas de acero templado para mayor resistencia
featuresEn: Tempered steel tines for greater resistance

faqs.question: ¿Qué tipo de combustible utiliza este motocultor?
faqs.questionEn: What type of fuel does this tiller use?
faqs.answer: Este motocultor utiliza gasolina sin plomo de 87 octanos o superior. El motor es de 4 tiempos, por lo que NO requiere mezcla de aceite con la gasolina.
faqs.answerEn: This tiller uses unleaded gasoline of 87 octane or higher. The engine is 4-stroke, so it does NOT require oil mixed with gasoline.

faqs.question: ¿Cuál es el ancho de trabajo máximo?
faqs.questionEn: What is the maximum working width?
faqs.answer: El ancho de trabajo es de 36 cm, ideal para trabajos en espacios medianos y huertos familiares.
faqs.answerEn: The working width is 36 cm, ideal for medium spaces and family gardens.

faqs.question: ¿Qué mantenimiento requiere?
faqs.answer: Mantenimiento básico incluye: cambio de aceite cada 25 horas de uso, limpieza del filtro de aire, revisión de bujías y lubricación de puntos móviles según manual del usuario.
faqs.answerEn: Basic maintenance includes: oil change every 25 hours of use, air filter cleaning, spark plug inspection, and lubrication of moving parts according to user manual.

faqs.question: ¿Incluye garantía?
faqs.answer: Sí, incluye garantía de 12 meses por defectos de fabricación. La garantía cubre motor, transmisión y componentes principales.
faqs.answerEn: Yes, it includes a 12-month warranty for manufacturing defects. The warranty covers engine, transmission, and main components.

faqs.question: ¿Es adecuado para terrenos duros?
faqs.questionEn: Is it suitable for hard terrain?
faqs.answer: Sí, con su motor de 7HP y fresas de acero templado, puede trabajar eficientemente en terrenos compactados y duros.
faqs.answerEn: Yes, with its 7HP engine and tempered steel tines, it can work efficiently on compacted and hard terrain.
